title: sidotheca emarginata
intro: Sidotheca emarginata, also known as the lesser yellow alder or yellow water alder, is a species of shrub in the family Phytolaccaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Sidotheca emarginata are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and homeopathic medicine.
